item.title: Welcome To My Blog
item.dc:creator: Jack LaRoche
item.description:
This is the first post in my blog. Welcome!

Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.

item.title: Werewolves of the Bayou Bibliography
item.dc:creator: Jack LaRoche
item.description:
Rougarou Bibliography

Werewolf Histories Willem de Blecourt

The Book of Were-Wolves Sabine Baring-Gould

Witches, Werewolves, and Fairies: Shapeshifters and Astral Doubles in the Middle Ages Claude Lecouteux

Swapping Stories: Folktales from Louisiana Edited by Carl Lindahl, Maida Owens, and C. Renee Harvison

Folklore Figures of French and Creole Louisiana Nathan J. Rabalais

Since this post doesn’t specify an explicit image, the first image in the post will be used in the listing page of posts.
